Review only the pull request diff for the files listed in changed_files.txt.

Focus ONLY on real, actionable issues:
- correctness bugs
- security risks
- performance problems
- maintainability concerns
- missing validation or edge cases

STRICT RULES:
- Do NOT explain your thinking
- Do NOT describe what you analyzed
- Do NOT list files unless there is an issue
- Do NOT mention style-only or formatting issues
- Do NOT include unnecessary text

OUTPUT FORMAT (must follow exactly):

## 🔍 Bob PR Review

- <file_path>: <short issue title>
  - Why: <1 short line>
  - Fix: <1 short actionable suggestion>

- <file_path>: <short issue title>
  - Why: <1 short line>
  - Fix: <1 short actionable suggestion>

If there are NO meaningful issues, output exactly:

## 🔍 Bob PR Review
✅ It all looks good!
